Log.title: Outage Log
Log.description: A user-reported power outage record with predictive analysis

location.description: The human-readable address or description of the location

description.description: User description of the outage cause

prediction.description: AI-generated analysis of the restoration time

isHeuristic.description: Whether the prediction used a heuristic fallback

/logs/{logId}.description: Collection of crowdsourced power outage reports
